name: Blade Ward
description: You extend your hand and trace a sigil of warding in the air. Until the end of your next turn, you have resistance against bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage dealt by weapon attacks.
effect: Gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from weapon attacks until the end of your next turn.
notes: Grants weapon-damage resistance for 1 round at the cost of your action — situationally useful near death or when tanking
